General.Name: C&N Holdings Ltd
General.Description: C&N Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides transport and storage services to the logistics industry in Singapore and Hong Kong. The company operates in two segments, Trucking and Hubbing. The Trucking segment offers cargo transportation and other related services for containers. The Hubbing segment engages in handling and storage of laden and empty containers. &N Holdings Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Singapore.
General.Address: 3 Soon Lee Street, No. 06?03, Singapore, Singapore, 627606
